# 06-01 Kickoff with Globex

## Summary

The owner opened the meeting and walked Globex through the proposal structure. The Globex team agreed to share their resolution-time data by end of week. The owner committed to sending the revised P&L spreadsheet by Friday 2026-06-05.

## Decisions

- Engagement will kick off on 2026-07-01.
- Pricing model confirmed as time-and-materials.

## Action items

- **Tony**: Send the revised P&L spreadsheet to Globex by Friday 2026-06-05.
- **Globex team**: Share resolution-time data with The owner by end of week.
- **Speaker 2**: Prepare a brief on the competitive landscape.
